description: Hook bundle. (1) auto-refine.sh on UserPromptSubmit — injects a system reminder telling Claude to evaluate every prompt against the refine-prompt skill's messiness heuristic, run the skill on messy prompts, skip on clean/short/mid-flow prompts, and treat the refined prompt as canonical after `go`. (2) annotate-wait.py on Stop — when an annotate-skill response was just pushed to the browser view, blocks up to 2 h waiting for the user to click Submit, then injects the annotations back to Claude as a system reminder so Claude resumes automatically. Bails in milliseconds when no annotate session is mid-flight.
